title: veronica longifolia subsp. exortiva
intro: Veronica longifolia subsp. exortiva is a subspecies of the long-leaved speedwell, a flowering plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Veronica longifolia subsp. exortiva can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
